text.content: Hello!

rich_text.plain_text: Hello!

text.content: So you’re coming fastpacking in the Cederberg - how ridiculously exciting.

rich_text.plain_text: So you’re coming fastpacking in the Cederberg - how ridiculously exciting.

text.content: What is fastpacking? It’s basically overnight hiking, without the tents and general comforts. Those are traded for increasing the distance that can be covered each day. Smaller and lighter bags allow the flats and declines to be jogged and the uphills to be hiked quicker than on a hike. These increases in speed allow for more coffee breaks, stops and general nonsense.

rich_text.plain_text: What is fastpacking? It’s basically overnight hiking, without the tents and general comforts. Those are traded for increasing the distance that can be covered each day. Smaller and lighter bags allow the flats and declines to be jogged and the uphills to be hiked quicker than on a hike. These increases in speed allow for more coffee breaks, stops and general nonsense.

text.content: This page should give you an overview of what to expect, pack and prepare for.

rich_text.plain_text: This page should give you an overview of what to expect, pack and prepare for.

text.content: Logistics

rich_text.plain_text: Logistics

text.content: We are going to camp in Algeria on the evening of Wednesday 20th March. Ensure that you’ve organised lifts and bring a tent.

rich_text.plain_text: We are going to camp in Algeria on the evening of Wednesday 20th March. Ensure that you’ve organised lifts and bring a tent.

text.content: Route

rich_text.plain_text: Route

text.content: The page below contains the basic route information. Please note that the route should be taken as a guideline: mountains are mountains, paths are paths - we should always trust what is happening in-front of us over what a pre-set GPX file is telling us.

rich_text.plain_text: The page below contains the basic route information. Please note that the route should be taken as a guideline: mountains are mountains, paths are paths - we should always trust what is happening in-front of us over what a pre-set GPX file is telling us.

text.content: We will inevitably stray from the prescribed route for any number of reasons: fun or less fun. The route is set to provide a baseline that we can organise logistics around, when we are out in the mountains we will be dynamic, smart and safe.

rich_text.plain_text: We will inevitably stray from the prescribed route for any number of reasons: fun or less fun. The route is set to provide a baseline that we can organise logistics around, when we are out in the mountains we will be dynamic, smart and safe.

text.content: This route is broken up by running past Algeria on Saturday morning. This allows for an exit point in the case of injury.

rich_text.plain_text: This route is broken up by running past Algeria on Saturday morning. This allows for an exit point in the case of injury.

text.content: If you have a GPS watch, please load the GPX files for each day.

rich_text.plain_text: If you have a GPS watch, please load the GPX files for each day.

text.content: Packing

rich_text.plain_text: Packing

text.content: Packing for fastpacking can become stressful if you allow it to be. I wrote a long piece a few years ago when preparing for a fastpacking trip through the Transkei with Fred and Damo:

rich_text.plain_text: Packing for fastpacking can become stressful if you allow it to be. I wrote a long piece a few years ago when preparing for a fastpacking trip through the Transkei with Fred and Damo:

text.content: It is a fairly long article, to summarise the main takeaway points with regard to packing:

rich_text.plain_text: It is a fairly long article, to summarise the main takeaway points with regard to packing:

text.content: Weight is something to minimise

rich_text.plain_text: Weight is something to minimise

text.content: Running is less enjoyable the heavier you are. We’re going there to do a lot of running - try and maximise the enjoyment of it.

rich_text.plain_text: Running is less enjoyable the heavier you are. We’re going there to do a lot of running - try and maximise the enjoyment of it.

text.content: Pack what you have

rich_text.plain_text: Pack what you have

text.content: It’s so easy to want all the high tech, ultralight, ultra-small and vastly overpriced gear out there. You’ll never get it all, there will always be something else. Borrow gear where possible, and then use what you have without regret.

rich_text.plain_text: It’s so easy to want all the high tech, ultralight, ultra-small and vastly overpriced gear out there. You’ll never get it all, there will always be something else. Borrow gear where possible, and then use what you have without regret.

text.content: Pack things that can prevent your trip being ruined

rich_text.plain_text: Pack things that can prevent your trip being ruined

text.content: The adventure of fastpacking is incredible as it is - you don’t need many extra things. These are simple things that you will kick yourself if you don’t have. Some of them are obvious, others less so:

rich_text.plain_text: The adventure of fastpacking is incredible as it is - you don’t need many extra things. These are simple things that you will kick yourself if you don’t have. Some of them are obvious, others less so:

text.content: Medical kit - a comprehensive one; we can share these.

rich_text.plain_text: Medical kit - a comprehensive one; we can share these.

text.content: Vaseline - just ask Damo about his chafe in the Transkei.

rich_text.plain_text: Vaseline - just ask Damo about his chafe in the Transkei.

text.content: Good sleeping equipment - running on poor night’s sleep is like adding 5kg to your bag. Try maximise the quality of sleep you’re going to get.

rich_text.plain_text: Good sleeping equipment - running on poor night’s sleep is like adding 5kg to your bag. Try maximise the quality of sleep you’re going to get.

text.content: Pack for running, not for camp

rich_text.plain_text: Pack for running, not for camp

text.content: This is something that I changed my mind on. I brought many nice things for the camp up the mountain with me, but in the effort of dragging them up 2000m of Drakensberg mountains we weren’t able to play more than two games of backgammon, truly enjoy a slab of Lint and really appreciate how nice the cave was with top down lighting.

rich_text.plain_text: This is something that I changed my mind on. I brought many nice things for the camp up the mountain with me, but in the effort of dragging them up 2000m of Drakensberg mountains we weren’t able to play more than two games of backgammon, truly enjoy a slab of Lint and really appreciate how nice the cave was with top down lighting.

text.content: I will probably bring the backgammon set to the Transkei because I love the game, but the extra light and Lint will have to stay home.

rich_text.plain_text: I will probably bring the backgammon set to the Transkei because I love the game, but the extra light and Lint will have to stay home.

text.content: Bring suncream lip balm

rich_text.plain_text: Bring suncream lip balm

text.content: Almost four days after coming back from the mountains my lips still resemble a dry river bed.

rich_text.plain_text: Almost four days after coming back from the mountains my lips still resemble a dry river bed.

text.content: Water is heavy, take that into account

rich_text.plain_text: Water is heavy, take that into account

text.content: On top of that - we are going to be running through the Cederberg at the end of the dry season. This means that we’re going to be refilling all our water as often as possible. Personally I will aim to carry about 2.5L of water on me as often as possible. Factor in the extra weight.

rich_text.plain_text: On top of that - we are going to be running through the Cederberg at the end of the dry season. This means that we’re going to be refilling all our water as often as possible. Personally I will aim to carry about 2.5L of water on me as often as possible. Factor in the extra weight.

text.content: Please note - it’s not vital to have a pack designed specifically for fastpacking. They are definitely incredible in terms of comfort while running, but any pack between 30L → 40L should be fine if it won’t bounce around too much.

text.content: Safety

rich_text.plain_text: Safety

text.content: We’re heading off into a remote part of the world. We are going to be self-propelled and self-sufficient. While we will do everything possible to ensure that this goes smoothly, it’s possible that things can go wrong.

rich_text.plain_text: We’re heading off into a remote part of the world. We are going to be self-propelled and self-sufficient. While we will do everything possible to ensure that this goes smoothly, it’s possible that things can go wrong.

text.content: Water

rich_text.plain_text: Water

text.content: The largest risk will be water. From what I’ve seen the Cederberg isn’t as dry as it could be after summer - so that is on our side. Yet running out of water while fastpacking is always something to be aware of. Ultimately, your water management will be up to you; you know the impertinence of hydration when it comes to running long distances.

rich_text.plain_text: The largest risk will be water. From what I’ve seen the Cederberg isn’t as dry as it could be after summer - so that is on our side. Yet running out of water while fastpacking is always something to be aware of. Ultimately, your water management will be up to you; you know the impertinence of hydration when it comes to running long distances.

text.content: I would suggest doing the following:

rich_text.plain_text: I would suggest doing the following:

text.content: Running with >2.5L of water capacity

rich_text.plain_text: Running with >2.5L of water capacity

text.content: Filling up your water capacity whenever possible

rich_text.plain_text: Filling up your water capacity whenever possible

text.content: Dehydration can hit quickly and end the trip quite abruptly.

rich_text.plain_text: Dehydration can hit quickly and end the trip quite abruptly.

text.content: Emergency

rich_text.plain_text: Emergency

text.content: I am going to borrow a

rich_text.plain_text: I am going to borrow a

text.content: satellite communicator

rich_text.plain_text: satellite communicator

text.content: from a friend to ensure that we can contact help if we need.

rich_text.plain_text: from a friend to ensure that we can contact help if we need.

text.content: In the case of an emergency, we will contact the Cederberg rangers as well as a friend back in Cape Town who will be able to coordinate things on the phone.

rich_text.plain_text: In the case of an emergency, we will contact the Cederberg rangers as well as a friend back in Cape Town who will be able to coordinate things on the phone.

text.content: In the case of an injury, it will depend on where we are on the route. It’s likely that two people will accompany the injured person out if the rest of the group can continue.

rich_text.plain_text: In the case of an injury, it will depend on where we are on the route. It’s likely that two people will accompany the injured person out if the rest of the group can continue.

text.content: We will have a comprehensive medical kit with us. If you are allergic to anything or require any special medication - please bring it.

rich_text.plain_text: We will have a comprehensive medical kit with us. If you are allergic to anything or require any special medication - please bring it.

text.content: Enough words - let’s go already

rich_text.plain_text: Enough words - let’s go already

text.content: I can assure you this is going to be a healthy dose of type 1 fun (and likely a sprinkle of type 2 fun). We are going to go slow and steady. Believe in your body - it can go much further than you may think. Enjoy the process and take in the views, it’s one of the more spectacular places on earth.

rich_text.plain_text: I can assure you this is going to be a healthy dose of type 1 fun (and likely a sprinkle of type 2 fun). We are going to go slow and steady. Believe in your body - it can go much further than you may think. Enjoy the process and take in the views, it’s one of the more spectacular places on earth.
